function_signatures.name: run_cmd
function_signatures.signature:
def run_cmd(cmd: list[str],
    output_file: Optional[Path] = None,
    stdin_data: Optional[str]   = None,
    label: str = "",
    capture: bool = False,
    silent: bool = False,)

chain_examples.note: Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with thewhiteh4t/seeker (score=10); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with iojw/socialscan (score=10); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with devanshbatham/ParamSpider (score=10); pair in the chain planner.
Phase 3: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='recon'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.
Phase 4: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='recon'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.
Phase 5: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='recon'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.

documentation.when_to_use: Use this tool when the engagement is in the 'recon' phase against a target with '['web']' as the attack surface (osint, toolbox, github).
documentation.why_to_use: This tool is preferred because: Index entry in the OSINT category. Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner after a NVD/lookup pass on the target vendor.

trust.warning: Attribution/index entry only. Audit provenance, code, releases and licence before use.

use_cases: Index entry in the OSINT category. Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner after a NVD/lookup pass on the target vendor.
Pairs with the OSINT system-prompt stanza in core.ai_backend.chain to teach the LLM the standard invocation pattern.
Operator-initiated: the chain step is gated by the per-step ACCEPT/CANCEL gate; the tool does not auto-execute.
Use as a reference implementation when designing a new v3 method for this category.
Use as a teaching example in the prompt stanza so the LLM can reason about the right run order.
